overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a hooded character exploring a dark medieval interior with a torch. The character moves slowly through a timber-framed room containing a dining table and a fallen body, with warm torchlight illuminating the wooden beams and earthen floor.

scene_state.functional_zone: medieval house interior with dining area

agents.ego_description: hooded character holding a torch, slowly walking through the room and examining a body on the floor near the dining table

notable_agents.action: lying motionless on the floor next to the table, apparently dead or unconscious

entered.detail: darkened doorway with wooden frame leading to another area
long wooden dining table with scattered food items and bowls
large metal cooking pot sitting against the wall
red fabric hangings draped along the wall above the table
exposed timber framing and support beams for the ceiling
clay bowls and plates containing food remains on the table surface

segments.scene_description: The character moves slowly through a dimly lit medieval room, holding a torch that casts flickering shadows on the wooden beams and plaster walls. A wooden dining table occupies the right side of the room with scattered bowls and food, while a body lies motionless on the floor nearby. The character approaches the doorway at the far end while examining the scene.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dimly lit medieval interior as the character progresses from the center of a room toward an exit. It begins with the character moving slowly through the space, where a flickering torch casts dancing shadows across heavy wooden beams and plaster walls. As the camera advances, it passes a wooden dining table cluttered with scattered bowls and food, revealing a motionless body lying on the earthen floor nearby. The scene then shifts focus toward the far end of the room, following the character as they examine the grim surroundings before finally approaching the open doorway.
